meta.title: Prestivio — Credit Broker | Tailored Loans and Financing
meta.description: Prestivio is the independent credit broker that finds the best loan for you by comparing over 30 banks.

hero.title: Your loan, tailored
hero.subtitle: We compare over 30 banks and financial institutions to find you the most convenient credit solution. Total transparency, zero hidden costs.
hero.trustBadge: Registered in the OAM Register · Independent brokers since 2009

services.title: Credit solutions for every need
services.subtitle: From your first home to renovation, from personal loans to salary-backed loans.

whyUs.title: The broker that works for you, not for the bank
whyUs.subtitle: We are independent intermediaries: our only goal is to find you the best conditions.

f1.title: Total independence
f1.description: We are not tied to any bank. We compare over 30 institutions to offer you only the most advantageous conditions.

f2.title: Absolute transparency
f2.description: No hidden costs, no surprises. We show you every figure, every condition.

f3.title: Dedicated advisory
f3.description: An expert advisor follows your application from start to finish.

f4.title: Fast approval
f4.description: Thanks to our relationships with banks, we get answers in 48 hours.

process.title: Four steps toward your financing
process.subtitle: A simple and transparent path, from the first consultation to disbursement.

s1.title: Free consultation
s1.description: You tell us about your project. We analyze your situation and identify the most suitable solutions.

s2.title: Bank comparison
s2.description: We query over 30 institutions to find the best conditions.

s3.title: Application and documents
s3.description: We help you prepare the documentation and manage the entire application.

s4.title: Disbursement
s4.description: Once approved, the funds arrive in your account.

testimonials.title: Our clients' trust
testimonials.subtitle: Over 40,000 families and businesses have chosen Prestivio for their financing.

t1.quote: They found me a rate almost two points below what my bank was offering.
t1.author: Marco Bellini

t2.quote: Debt consolidation that halved my monthly installment. Finally I can breathe.
t2.author: Giulia Ferraro

t3.quote: A mortgage for my first home at a rate I couldn't find anywhere else.
t3.author: Andrea Conti
